# Universal Reliability View

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** f8639939-9d27-4a59-a776-484aa5520f61
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Is intuition about what counts as a reliable process subjective?](is-intuition-about-what-counts-as-a-reliable-process-subjective-antithesis-9e611571-e84b-45d5-b895-90e888e47177.md)

## Content

**Knowledge involves true belief generated by universally recognized reliable methods**, **A process counts as reliable if it is universally acknowledged as such beyond subjective opinions**, **Universal reliability is assessed through universally shared principles**, **A person knows a proposition if their justified true belief is produced by universally recognized reliable methods**
